projectDescription: A full-stack web application for managing event volunteers, shift scheduling, check-ins, and asset tracking — built with Next.js and Supabase.
keyFeatures: Event and shift management with templates, recurring shifts, and clone support
Volunteer database with group-based organization and CSV bulk import
Auto-assign scheduling powered by a high-performance Go API with fairness scoring
Tablet-friendly Kiosk mode for self-service volunteer check-in/check-out
Asset tracking for equipment (radios, vests, keys) during events
Real-time dashboard with fill rate analytics and live check-in feed
PDF and CSV report export for schedules, sign-in sheets, and attendance records
Role-based access control with Supabase authentication and Row Level Security
publicApiSurface: POST /api/schedule — Run auto-assignment on volunteers and shifts (JSON)
POST /api/schedule/csv — Run auto-assignment via CSV upload
POST /api/validate — Validate request payload without scheduling
GET /api/usage — Retrieve current quota and usage history
Authorization: Bearer [user_id].[signature] — HMAC-signed API key auth
